title: rubus × patulispinus
intro: Rubus × patulispinus, also known as the thimbleberry or thimble-brush, is a hybrid plant species in the rose family, known for its edible fruits and medicinal properties. This plant contains anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds, which are responsible for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus × patulispinus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Rubus × patulispinus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, as well as being consumed fresh or dried to enjoy its medicinal properties.
